response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content to identify performers and the song. The performers are Ayunda Risu and Nerissa Ravencroft. The on-screen text identifies the song as 'ライオン' (Lion) with credits for Lyrics and Music. 2. Performed searches for 'ライオン マクロスF 歌詞' and 'Lion Macross Frontier lyrics english translation' to retrieve official lyrics. 3. Mapped the song to the main performance scene (00:02-04:51) and defined intro/outro scenes. 4. Constructed the JSON object with all metadata and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D musical performance of the song 'Lion' by two VTubers, Ayunda Risu and Nerissa Ravencroft.

scenes.description: The two performers are standing on a misty, grassy path in front of some buildings, preparing for the performance.
The VTubers Ayunda Risu and Nerissa Ravencroft perform a dance and singing cover of the song 'Lion' (ライオン) from the anime 'Macross Frontier'. On-screen text displays the song title and credits.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Go around the stars, right in the middle of the world
When you sneeze, butterflies flutter wildly in a forest somewhere
It's not certain for you to protect the key to the door
Even if it tastes an embarrassing story, the lion is strong
I want to survive, I want to survive, I feel like I still want to live
By the guidance of the constellations, we gazed at each other just now
I want to survive, I become lost at what to do
And wither away in a sparkle
Until I show off my serious self, I won't sleep
The wind will head toward the east before long, right?
The high atmospheric pressure attacks the door to this planet
My chest that drank the priming water feels painful
I mix together with a story that surrounds me from afar,
Deep into my bones
I want to survive, I want to survive, I feel like I still want to live
By the guidance of the constellations, we gazed at each other just now
I want to survive, I become lost at what to do
And wither away in a sparkle
Until I show off my serious self, I won't sleep
What was I born to do?
What am I to do here?
I want to survive, my unburied wound feared the light
Our permitted lives attracted each other just now
My wandering is over and I'm next to you, I want to quell my blushing
Until I show off my serious self, I won't sleep
I want to survive, I'm fine with being on the edge of a cliff, I love you
Our feelings of wishing to wake up attracted each other just now
I fall into rapture and offer a prayer, I love you
By the guidance of the constellations -
I want to survive, I still want to live, I love you
Until I show off my serious heart, I won't sleep

scenes.description: The music ends, and the performers pose to finish the song.
